subject: Braviary, a large eagle-like bird with a red, white, and blue color scheme, wings spread wide in dynamic flight
description: Braviary is captured in full-spread flight, wings extended to their full dramatic wingspan filling much of the frame. The bird's coloring is vivid — a red beak and facial plumage around a white head, dark navy-to-black wing feathers with blue-grey secondary feathers, and a broadly patterned chest. Below and behind it, a landscape of red-orange rocky cliffs or canyon formations is visible under a bright sky with scattered clouds. The composition is wide and action-oriented, emphasizing the creature's scale and aerial power. The mood is heroic and kinetic.
foreground: Braviary with wings fully spread in active flight
background: red-orange rocky canyon landscape, bright sky with clouds
